content:
Shu Gong is currently a visiting researcher at Massachusetts General Hospital/ Harvard Medical School, working with Dr. Weilong Zheng and Prof. Westover.
Prior to joining MGH/ HMS, he was a visiting student at University of Essex, UK, from July 2019 to Sept. 2019. He has a broad interests in machine learning and biomedical signal processing.

title: Shu Gong
